description: For every prime in the tested set (2,000 primes ≤17,389), the code explicitly computes all eigenvectors of h₁ and h₂ in F_p^2 and found no overlap. For all these p, h₁ and h₂ have distinct eigenlines or no eigenvector at all, hence no common eigenvector. Data and code provided prove this numerically up to p=17,389.
